description_long: This helmet features a rounded, dome-shaped metal cap with a smooth, dark finish, topped by a small loop at the apex. The front is adorned with a prominent, gold-colored nasal guard that extends downward to protect the face, attached with visible rivets. Surrounding the lower edge of the helmet is an extensive chainmail aventail, draping down to cover the neck, shoulders, and upper chest for added protection. The chainmail is composed of interlinked metallic rings, creating a flexible yet sturdy mesh. The helmet lacks any visible ventilation holes, decorative motifs, or branding, giving it a utilitarian, historical appearance. Its construction suggests it is designed for robust head and neck protection, likely inspired by medieval or early urban combat gear.
description: A rounded, dark metal helmet with a gold nasal guard and a wide chainmail aventail covering the neck and shoulders. The design is plain and functional, with no visible graphics or vents.
description_view_0: Front view shows the gold nasal guard and the full drape of the chainmail aventail.
description_view_1: Front-left view highlights the helmet's curvature and the side profile of the nasal guard.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, uninterrupted dome and the full spread of the chainmail at the back.
description_view_3: Front-right view mirrors the left, showing the nasal guard's attachment and the chainmail's side coverage.
